**Feb 08 | ✅ 📌 ✍️ Slide Content Cleanup for Stanford Talk**

Streamlined all text slides for Dr. Sandeep Attawar's "Challenges to Lung Transplants in India" presentation for the 2026 Stanford Cardiothoracic Transplantation Symposium. Tidied grammar, spacing, punctuation, and phrasing across ~12 content slides. Caught a duplicate content error (slide 9 had slide 8's content under the wrong title). Maintained consistent professional tone for a transplant physician audience throughout.
